creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 194193
Archive with patched games/oolite port

(In reply to comment #9)
> The patch bogusly includes the following, which is already in the repo.
> I am once again going to try to test, without it:
> 
> games/oolite/files/patch-deps_mozilla_js_src_configure
The patch in attachment #194191 (as well as in the previous attachment #189216) removes "games/oolite/files/patch-deps_mozilla_js_src_configure" file:
-8<--
% fetch -qo oolite.diff "https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?id=194191"
% sha256 oolite.diff 
SHA256 (oolite.diff) = acfa74c4afecbd73072aa78fdd6ed82e62bf4f2eacf52c4ccad7db5078f7a4e8
% svn co -r 460106 https://svn.FreeBSD.org/ports/head/games/oolite
A    oolite/files
A    oolite/Makefile
A    oolite/distinfo
A    oolite/files/patch-deps_mozilla-bug771281
A    oolite/files/patch-deps_mozilla_js_src_configure
A    oolite/files/patch-deps_mozilla_js_src_configure.in
A    oolite/files/patch-deps_mozilla_js_src_jsscript.h
A    oolite/files/patch-deps_mozilla_js_src_jsstr.cpp
A    oolite/files/patch-src_Core_OOMaths.h
A    oolite/files/patch-src_Core_OOPointMaths.h
A    oolite/files/oolite.in
A    oolite/pkg-descr
Checked out revision 460106.
% cd oolite
% svn patch --strip 2 ../oolite.diff
U         Makefile
A         files/patch-deps_mozilla_js_src_assembler_jit_ExecutableAllocator.h
A         files/patch-deps_mozilla_js_src_assembler_wtf_Platform.h
D         files/patch-deps_mozilla_js_src_configure
U         files/patch-deps_mozilla_js_src_configure.in
A         files/patch-deps_mozilla_js_src_nanojit_CodeAlloc.cpp
A         files/patch-deps_mozilla_js_src_nanojit_njcpudetect.h
-->8-

The "D         files/patch-deps_mozilla_js_src_configure" line in above output.

The "games/oolite/files/patch-deps_mozilla_js_src_configure" file patches ${WRKSRC}/deps/mozilla/js/src/configure file, but this is not needed, because it may be regenerated based on ${WRKSRC}/deps/mozilla/js/src/configure.in file (the attachment #194191 contains changes for it also) with using autoconf-2.13 (devel/autoconf213) utility on pre-configure stage.

(In reply to comment #10)
> configure: error: Your compiler does not follow the C++ specification for
> temporary object destruction order.
Perhaps, this issue was fixed with using changes from ports r460106, which added USE_CXXSTD=gnu++98 for Makefile. Also possible to use OBJC_CLANG_VERSION=60 (instead of OBJC_CLANG_VERSION=40, which defined in Mk/Uses/objc.mk), at least for make command, which may use Clang compiler from devel/llvm60, but probably this is not needed for latest FreeBSD version, where Clang 6.0 compiler available in base.

I may suggest to test patched (with using unchanged attachment #194191) games/oolite port, if possible.
I attached archive with patched games/oolite port for example.

If it still fails to configure/build, then, I guess, this PR may be closed/rejected.
Possible, that other changes are needed, but I don't have configured armv6 (armv7) environment to test this.

Thanks for attention.
